- [ ] US1 — Return a consistent machine-readable command contract: standardize structured responses across graph commands.
- [ ] US2 — Compare graph revisions with diff: expose revision-aware change reporting via `graph diff`.
- [ ] US3 — Verify end-to-end chainable agent workflows: prove native graph payloads work in realistic piped agent flows.
